FireControl.title: Fire control
FireControl.description: Will attempt to fight any fires.

Patient.title: Patient
Patient.description: Will use beds when injured or sick to heal themselves back to full health.

Medical.title: Medical
Medical.description: Rescues, looks after and heals the sick or wounded.

Cook.title: Cook
Cook.description: Performs all cooking and brewing activities.

Botany.title: Botany
Botany.description: Tends to any plants including planting seeds and harvesting crops.

Engineering.title: Engineering
Engineering.description: Performs any maintenance and constructs or deconstructs anything required.

Janitor.title: Janitor
Janitor.description: Cleans flooring and performs many basic tasks.

Science.title: Science
Science.description: Performs research, development and other scientific activities.

Veterinarian.title: Veterinarian
Veterinarian.description: Trains and takes care of animals.

Machining.title: Machining
Machining.description: Creates various equipment and ship parts.

Labourer.title: Labourer
Labourer.description: Hauls the dead, equipment and resources where required. Refills designated machinery.
